name: Zhongmin Baihui Retail Group Ltd.
summary: Zhongmin Baihui Retail Group Ltd., an investment holding company, owns, operates, and manages a chain of department stores and supermarkets in the People's Republic of China. As of March 26, 2020, it operated 19 stores under the Zhongmin Baihui brand name comprising 16 self-owned stores and 3 managed stores with a total gross floor area of 219,100 square meters. The company provides its merchandise, lifestyle products, and customer-oriented services to middle income consumers. Zhongmin Baihui Retail Group Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Singapore.
